data.title: CyberArk Q4 Revenue Surges 41%, Subscription And Strong ARR Clock Strong Growth
data.description: CYBR reported impressive Q4 2024 results with 41% revenue growth and beating analyst estimates. Stock price increased and outlook remains strong.

data.title: Will Palo Alto's Q2 Earnings Validate 'Cybersecurity Is Bigger Than AI'?
data.description: Palo Alto Networks Inc. (PANW) is catching up to competitors in the cybersecurity space, with high expectations for its Q2 earnings and potential for double-digit growth in the long-term.

data.title: A Look Into Curtiss-Wright Inc's Price Over Earnings
Howmet Aerospace Q4 Earnings: Revenue Up 9%, Beats Estimates, Cautious 2025 Outlook And More
data.description: Howmet Aerospace reported strong Q4 2024 results with 9.2% revenue growth and beat estimates. The company also provided positive outlook for 2025.

data.title: Robinhood's Crypto Bet Pays Off: Bernstein Predicts Massive Growth, $105 Price Target
data.description: Bernstein upgrades price target for Robinhood to $105, citing Q4 earnings & expects continued growth in crypto & revenue expansion through 2025.
